testcase.name: SC20-T04 · photo upload 链路 + judgeNode client (mp unit) > TC1 · presign POST /api/file/presign 带 X-Idempotency-Key + content_type=image/jpeg
SC20-T04 · photo upload 链路 + judgeNode client (mp unit) > TC2 · judgeNode POST /api/review/nodes/{nid}/judge 带 X-Idempotency-Key + body{user_answer_image_key}
SC20-T04 · photo upload 链路 + judgeNode client (mp unit) > TC3 · judgeNode 503 抛 Error (前端 _triggerJudge catch 走 SC-22 降级 fall through 不阻塞)
SC20-T04 · photo upload 链路 + judgeNode client (mp unit) > TC4 · 边界 · 10MB 上限验证 (capture.ts L108-111 同 const · _handlePhotoUpload 边界一致)
SC20-T04 · photo upload 链路 + judgeNode client (mp unit) > TC5 · TI2 i18n key 字面映射: zh="拍照" · en="Photo" · key="exec.answer.photo"
SC20-T04 · photo upload 链路 + judgeNode client (mp unit) > TC6 · photoSizeLabel 格式化: 487 KB / 1.5 MB / 980 KB
